title: Sr. Data Analyst, Omnichannel/AdTech (Remote, India)
description: Theres likely a reason youve taken the time out of your busy day to review this opportunity at PulsePoint. Maybe youre in need of a change or theres an itch youre looking to scratch. Whatever may be the reason, listen to what some of our team members are saying about working hereMy manager takes the time to not only identify my next career move, but the steps that will take me there. I even have my own personal training budget that Im encouraged to spend. Our input is valued and considered. Ever
